song.title: I Offer My Life
song.author: Don Moen, Claire Cloninger
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D G 1) All that I am, all that I have. .A G D D/C# I lay them down before You, O Lord. .Bm C All my regrets, all my acclaim, . Em7 D/F# The joy and the pain, . G Asus A I’m making them Yours.
[C] Chorus .D D/C# Bm Lord, I offer my life to You. . Em7 D/F# Everything I’ve been through, . G Asus A Use it for Your glory. .D D/C# Bm Lord, I offer my days to You, . Em7 D/F# G A Bm Lifting my praise to You, as a pleasing sacrifice. .G A D Lord, I offer You my life.
[V2] 2) Things in the past, things yet unseen, Wishes and dreams that are yet to come true. All of my hopes, all of my plans My heart and my hands are lifted to You.
[E] 1) All that I am, all that I have. I lay them down before You, O Lord. All my regrets, all my acclaim, The joy and the pain, I’m making them Yours. Chorus Lord, I offer my life to You. Everything I’ve been through, Use it for Your glory. Lord, I offer my days to You, Lifting my praise to You, as a pleasing sacrifice. Lord, I offer You my life. 2) Things in the past, things yet unseen, Wishes and dreams that are yet to come true. All of my hopes, all of my plans My heart and my hands are lifted to You.
